scope: wave2 fan-out migration, PARTIAL: only the account-scoped 'usage' stream is ported at Tier 1. Legacy's 4 per-image detection streams (tags, categories, colors, faces_detections) require a per-configured-image multi-request fan-out the declarative engine dialect cannot express (ENGINE_GAP; see docs.md Known limits) and are NOT ported here — legacy stays authoritative for those 4 streams until a Tier-2 StreamHook closes the gap in a follow-up wave.

excluded.reason: ENGINE_GAP: per-image multi-request fan-out (one request per configured image_url) is not expressible in the declarative dialect; needs a StreamHook (Tier 2), out of scope for this wave's Tier-1-only fan-out
ENGINE_GAP: same per-image fan-out limitation as tags
